context: post-hackathon rearchitecture — drop vendor lock, drop costly programs, keep what works, make PCC integration as effective as possible
constraints: keep what genuinely makes the system better
PCC integration must be first-class (not a sidecar)
use Spark (192.168.108.72, 119GB RAM) for self-hosted services where it makes sense
operator onboarding is the killer use-case — keep the demo flow
stack_target: TypeScript monorepo, lives inside PCC as @pcc/agent-onboarder + @pcc/operator-runtime, uses Anthropic SDK directly
